name: muga
description: Fair to every click. Strips 450+ tracking params, respects affiliate links. Open source.

scripts.dev:firefox: bash scripts/with-firefox-manifest.sh web-ext run --source-dir src/ --target firefox-desktop
scripts.build:firefox: bash scripts/with-firefox-manifest.sh web-ext build --source-dir src/ --artifacts-dir dist/firefox/ --overwrite-dest
scripts.build: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
